/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/f3d.dir/F3DIcon.cxx.o CMakeFiles/f3d.dir/F3DColorMapTools.cxx.o CMakeFiles/f3d.dir/F3DConfigFileTools.cxx.o CMakeFiles/f3d.dir/F3DOptionsTools.cxx.o CMakeFiles/f3d.dir/F3DPluginsTools.cxx.o CMakeFiles/f3d.dir/F3DStarter.cxx.o CMakeFiles/f3d.dir/F3DSystemTools.cxx.o CMakeFiles/f3d.dir/main.cxx.o CMakeFiles/f3d.dir/__/external/tinyfiledialogs/tinyfiledialogs.cxx.o -o ../bin/f3d  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bluesbreaker/Development/f3d/build/lib:/usr/local/lib: ../lib/libf3d.so.3.3 -Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/local/lib:/home/bluesbreaker/Development/f3d/build/lib
